title: Best Free Online Tools for Indians in 2026 — No Login, No App Download
summary: A curated list of the best free online tools Indians use daily — for finance, health, productivity, and work. All free, no app download, no account needed.
content:
# Best Free Online Tools for Indians in 2026 — No Login, No App Download

The internet is full of tools that promise to be free, then demand your email, show ads, or ask for a subscription after 3 uses. This list is different — every tool here is genuinely free, works in your browser, and doesn't need you to create an account.

## Finance Tools

### EMI Calculator
Before taking any loan — home, car, or personal — calculate your exact monthly EMI, total interest, and full amortization schedule. Our [EMI Calculator](/tools/emi-calculator.html) also shows the impact of prepayment, so you can see exactly how much interest you save by paying ₹5,000 extra per month.

**Most searched by:** Home loan buyers, car loan applicants, personal loan borrowers

### Income Tax Calculator (New vs Old Regime)
India's tax system has two regimes and the rules change every budget. Our [Income Tax Calculator](/tools/income-tax-calculator.html) compares both regimes instantly — enter your salary and deductions, see which regime saves more.

### GST Calculator
For freelancers, shopkeepers, and small business owners: quickly add GST at 5%, 12%, 18%, or 28% to any base price, or extract the GST component from a GST-inclusive price. [GST Calculator](/tools/gst-calculator.html)

### SIP Calculator
See how a monthly SIP investment grows over time. Enter monthly amount, expected return rate, and tenure to see your wealth creation. [SIP Calculator](/tools/sip-calculator.html)

### Salary / CTC to In-Hand Calculator
That ₹12 LPA offer? Here's what you actually take home after PF, professional tax, and income tax. [Salary Calculator](/tools/salary-calculator.html)

## Health Tools

### BMI Calculator
Enter your height and weight to get your BMI and a clear interpretation — Underweight, Normal, Overweight, or Obese — with the ranges for each category. [BMI Calculator](/tools/bmi-calculator.html)

### Calorie Calculator (TDEE)
Calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure based on age, weight, height, and activity level — then set targets for weight loss, maintenance, or muscle gain. [Calorie Calculator](/tools/calorie-calculator.html)

### Ideal Weight Calculator
Based on your height, gender, and frame size — see the ideal healthy weight range according to four different standard formulas. [Ideal Weight Calculator](/tools/ideal-weight.html)

## Utility Tools

### Age Calculator
Calculate exact age in years, months, and days. Useful for checking government exam eligibility (UPSC, SSC, banking exams all have precise age cut-offs). [Age Calculator](/tools/age-calculator.html)

### Percentage Calculator
Three calculation modes: find the percentage of a number, find what percentage one number is of another, or find the original number given a percentage. [Percentage Calculator](/tools/percentage-calculator.html)

### Unit Converter
Length, weight, temperature, area, volume — all in one tool with instant conversion between metric and imperial. [Unit Converter](/tools/unit-converter.html)

### Date Calculator
How many days between two dates? What day of the week was a date 15 years ago? Add or subtract days from any date. [Date Calculator](/tools/date-calculator.html)

## Developer / Text Tools

### QR Code Generator
Generate QR codes for any URL, text, or contact — instantly, no account needed, downloadable as PNG. [QR Generator](/tools/qr-generator.html)

### JSON Formatter
Paste messy JSON, get clean, indented, validated JSON back. Useful for debugging APIs. [JSON Formatter](/tools/json-formatter.html)

### Base64 Encoder/Decoder
Encode or decode Base64 strings — common in API work, email attachments, and web development. [Base64 Tool](/tools/base64-encoder.html)

### Word Counter
Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimated reading time. Useful for articles, assignments, and social media content. [Word Counter](/tools/word-counter.html)

## AI-Powered Tools

### Forjit AI App Generator
Describe any tool or app in plain English and get a working HTML/JavaScript app in seconds. No coding knowledge needed.

**Examples that work well:**
- "Monthly budget tracker with categories and charts"
- "Quiz app with 10 questions about Indian geography"
- "Habit tracker with 30-day streak calendar"

### AI Document Generator
Generate resumes, cover letters, project reports, meal plans, and more — customised to your specific needs.
